# Clang trunk: assertion "Failed to convert memory constraint code to constraint id" in SelectionDAGBuilder::visitInlineAsm for invalid "=Vr" output constraint

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173618
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, backend:X86, crash, llvm:SelectionDAG, inline-asm, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-28T00:12:09Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/dWvhnWfGe

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/lib/CodeGen/SelectionDAG/SelectionDAGBuilder.cpp:10295: void llvm::SelectionDAGBuilder::visitInlineAsm(const llvm::CallBase&, const llvm::BasicBlock*): Assertion `ConstraintID != InlineAsm::ConstraintCode::Unknown && "Failed to convert memory constraint code to constraint id."' failed.
```

## Code
```c
int foo(void) {
  int a, b, c, d, e, f;
  asm("# Magic instruction" : "=r"(a), "=r"(d) : "r"(0));
  asm("# Magic instruction" : "=r"(b), "=r"(e) : "r"(0));
  asm("# Magic instruction" : "=r"(c), "=Vr"(f) : "r"(0));
  return a + b + c;
}
```

## Code
```c
int foo(void) {
  int a, b, c, d, e, f;
  asm("# Magic instruction" : "=r"(a), "=r"(d) : "r"(0));
  asm("# Magic instruction" : "=r"(b), "=r"(e) : "r"(0));
  asm("# Magic instruction" : "=r"(c), "=Vr"(f) : "r"(0));
  return a + b + c;
}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Reduces further to (https://godbolt.org/z/o1e6d754e):
```cpp
void foo(void) {
  int f;
  asm("" : "=V"(f));
}
```
Likely duplicate of https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173620. Fails with the same assertion, only on output instead of input operand. See further analysis there.

---
